query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, supplierName, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, status, discoveryNotes
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND status NOT IN ('billing_platform_stub', 'terminated')
  AND supplierName IN ('ABB', 'AAPT')
LIMIT 10;
